payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Partial left-edge crop of a stainless-steel double-door refrigerator with vertical dark handles, a reflective finish showing window-blind reflections, and visible denting/warping near the handle area; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m) and is partially cut off by the image edge.
